home.name: Catharina van der Boor
home.lede: Senior Lecturer in Global Mental Health at LSHTM and Co-Director of the Centre for Health in Humanitarian Crises. I design and evaluate mental health interventions for populations affected by conflict and displacement.
anchors: Fieldwork in Uganda, Ukraine, Colombia, Sweden
Consultant to WHO, UNICEF (via IMC), Mid Sweden University

work.title: MHPSS trial — Uganda and Ukraine
work.body: A multi-country trial of a mental health and psychosocial support intervention for populations affected by conflict and displacement, conducted across sites in Uganda and Ukraine.

work.title: Kankuamo Wellbeing Scale — Colombia
work.body: Cultural adaptation and psychometric validation of the Kankuamo Wellbeing Scale, developed with the Kankuamo Indigenous community in Colombia.

work.title: UNICEF Ukraine MHPSS needs assessment
work.body: Mental health and psychosocial support needs assessment for UNICEF in Ukraine, informing programme design in a conflict-affected setting.

home.closing: Available for consultancy on MHPSS programme design, cultural adaptation of instruments, and implementation evaluation.
